import struct, zlib
def png_size\(path\):
    with open\(path,'rb'\) as f:
        f.read\(8\)
        f.read\(4\)
        f.read\(4\)
        w = struct.unpack\('>I', f.read\(4\)\)[0]
        h = struct.unpack\('>I', f.read\(4\)\)[0]
        return w,h
for p in ['public/images/skoala/skoala-thumb.png','public/images/teatime/teatime-thumb.png','public/images/nnspect/nnspect-thumb.png','public/images/sakurabook/sakurabook-thumb.png']:
    print\(p, png_size\(p\)\)
" 2>&1)
